Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0xC09E "ZUB-C09E" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Zub.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Made the following changes to default to joystick control:
1. Patched the LDA #$A3 at $0BCF to be LDA #$CB instead 2. Patched the LDX #$01 at $5D93 to be LDX #$00 instead 3. Patched the STA $0837 at $5D98 to be STX $0837 instead 4. NOP'd out the DEX at $5D9B
Also made the following changes to allow the joystick button in port two to skip the long intro:
1. Patched the LDA $#F5, TAX at $4820 to be JMP $6600 instead 2. Added a routine at $6600 which extends the original pause routine at $4820 to also check the port 2 fire button, which if detected, balances the stack and jumps to $091E to start the game
